summary: ISS-848 (CRITICAL): Removed fabricated OPEN-007 citations from WIN-051, WIN-059, and part9. OPEN-007 does not exist in dome open problem list (only OPEN-001/003/004/006 active). Arguments reframed without spurious citations.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: We Found Our Own Fabricated Citations — And Fixed Them
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: A curmudgeon audit discovered that three live references to 'OPEN-007' on the dome's problem list were fabricated — the dome's model page lists only OPEN-001/003/004/006. WIN-051, WIN-059, and the conclusions section all cited a non-existent problem. All three references have been corrected; the underlying arguments are factually accurate, but the citations were spurious. We fixed it immediately.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Demonstrates that the review's adversarial self-review pipeline catches its own errors, not just the dome's. Self-correction under scrutiny is a feature of scientific practice — worth surfacing as a credibility signal.
